ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Time when the trade was opened */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the trading pair (e.g., ATOMUSDT) */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was opened */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price reached during the trade */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price reached during the trade */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was closed */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the trade */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Time when the trade was closed */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The exchange where the trade was executed */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* The unique identifier for the order associated with the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* The type of trade (e.g., market, limit, stop-loss) */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the trade (e.g., open, closed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading pair */,
  "symbol_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading pair */,
  "base_asset" TEXT /* Base asset of the trading pair */,
  "quote_asset" TEXT /* Quote asset of the trading pair */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* The unique identifier for the exchange where the trading pair is listed */,
  "min_price_precision" INTEGER /* The minimum price precision for the trading pair */,
  "min_quantity_precision" INTEGER /* The minimum quantity precision for the trading pair */,
  "min_notional" REAL /* The minimum notional value for a trade in the trading pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quote_assets" (
  "quote_asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quote asset */,
  "quote_asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the quote asset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quote asset */,
  "precision" INTEGER /* The precision of the quote asset */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the quote asset (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quote_asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "base_assets" (
  "base_asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each base asset */,
  "base_asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the base asset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the base asset */,
  "precision" INTEGER /* The precision of the base asset */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the base asset (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("base_asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading volume record */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the trading pair */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the trade */,
  "quote_asset_volume" REAL /* Volume of the trade in quote asset */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* The type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The exchange where the trade was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading fee record */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the trading pair */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee charged for the trade */,
  "fee_asset" TEXT /* Asset in which the fee is charged */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The exchange where the trade was executed */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* The type of fee (e.g., maker, taker) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_fees_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the user accessed the platform */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, trade) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
